title: drivebox
subtitle: CLI Google Drive Integration
description: drivebox is a command-line interface, written in Golang, bridging Google Drive storage to local file systems via the command line. Files can be uploaded to and unloaded from a user's Drive account after sign in via secure OAuth authentication with Google.

title: Priorify
subtitle: Productivity Manager Web App
description: Priorify is an application that allows users to manage their own upcoming events and assignments via a calendar system. The application is divided into two parts. A NextJS frontend provides an intuitive UI and OAuth authentication with Google. It is served by Flask RESTful API that manages Supabase's PostgreSQL database storing user calendars.
